prompt: Create an advertorial for 'SleepWave Patches' — transdermal sleep patches for adults 40+ struggling with insomnia. Expert: Dr. Priya Nair, PhD in neuroscience, former sleep lab director at Johns Hopkins. Root cause: 'adenosine receptor desensitization'. Ingredients: Magnesium Glycinate, L-Theanine, Ashwagandha KSM-66, Lemon Balm 10:1 extract. Disrupting: $28 billion sleep aid industry. Regular price $67/patch pack (30 day supply), discounted to $34 with 3-month bundle. 90-day guarantee. Opening patient story: Susan, 61, pediatric nurse, had been awake until 3am every night for 4 years, functioning on 3-4 hours of sleep.
assertions: The output is a complete HTML file starting with <!DOCTYPE html>
Dr. Priya Nair and Johns Hopkins background are mentioned
The adenosine receptor desensitization mechanism is explained
All 4 ingredients present: Magnesium Glycinate, L-Theanine, Ashwagandha KSM-66, Lemon Balm
Susan's patient story (nurse, 4 years of insomnia) is in The Moment Everything Broke section
SleepWave Patches named in product introduction
